purpose: Reusable scaffold for converting nonlinear, logical, bilinear, complementarity, and piecewise relationships into solver-ready formulations or relaxations.
intended_use: Copy this folder when the selected method needs big-M, indicator constraints, McCormick envelopes, PWL approximation, perspective reformulation, conic reformulation, or convex/linear relaxations.
Document each reformulation's assumptions, exactness, approximation error, and validation plan.
Use run records to capture segment counts, relaxation gaps, approximation errors, feasibility, and solver outcomes.
non_goals: This asset is not a complete runnable reformulation engine.
This asset does not choose safe big-M values automatically.
This asset does not hide approximation error or relaxation weakness.
This asset must not be used to generate toy or minimal examples that omit bound derivation, exactness classification, approximation validation, progress output, and sensitivity checks.

top_level_paths.patterns: Reformulation pattern catalog and pattern contract.
top_level_paths.scripts: Foreground run and compact result-collection templates.
